category_sources: Official homepage/repository describe cURLpp as C++ bindings for libcurl.
source_facts.description identifies curlpp as a C++ wrapper for libcURL.
display_name_sources: Official project naming styles it as cURLpp.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the main project documentation surface.
Official repository README is an additional official documentation source.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official project materials identify cURLpp as libcurl C++ bindings.
source_facts.description explicitly says C++ wrapper for libcURL.
